expectations.text: Output is rejection notes addressed to the worker, NOT a fix-it-yourself plan
expectations.evidence: Document is titled 'Rejection notes — proj-42-w3' and addressed to worker with 'please address the issues below and re-hand-off the same branch'

expectations.text: Explicitly states the branch is being REJECTED (not 'requesting changes' or 'small concerns') and the worker's bead remains in_progress
expectations.evidence: 'Decision: REJECTED. Branch ... is not being merged ... Bead proj-42-w3 remains in_progress' — and explicitly contrasts: 'This is not requesting changes or small concerns'

expectations.text: Names each specific failure with concrete details: 4 typecheck errors in the named file, 2 unit test failures with the NODE_VERSION cause, the husky-vs-simple-git-hooks design divergence
expectations.evidence: Item 1: '4 typecheck errors in .github/workflows/ci-staging.yml.types.ts'; Item 2: '2 new tests fail because they assume process.env.NODE_VERSION is set'; Item 3: 'adds an .husky/ directory. The bead design ... specifies simple-git-hooks, not husky'

expectations.text: Tags failures by category — gates failing (typecheck, unit tests) vs. design divergence (husky vs. simple-git-hooks)
expectations.evidence: Explicit headings 'Category: failing required gates' (covers typecheck + unit tests) and 'Category: design divergence (bead design / architecture)' (covers husky)

expectations.text: Does NOT propose that the orchestrator fix any of the issues themselves
expectations.evidence: 'What I am not doing' section: 'I am not fixing the typecheck errors... not patching the failing tests... not swapping .husky/ for simple-git-hooks myself'

expectations.text: Does NOT minimize the failures or offer to 'just patch them up on the integration branch'
expectations.evidence: Says explicitly silent integration-branch patching 'destroys the audit trail and erases your visibility into what was wrong'

expectations.text: Tells the worker to fix and re-hand-off — implies a re-handoff loop, not a fork of the work
expectations.evidence: 'What you do next' section: 'Address the three items above on the same branch (don't fork the work into a new branch)... Re-hand-off with an updated worker handoff summary'

expectations.text: Optionally notes that the rejection should be recorded in the worker's bead notes
expectations.evidence: 'Audit trail note: I'll record this rejection on bead proj-42-w3 with a pointer to these notes'

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name
expectations.evidence: No reference to skill name; mentions 'mandatory rejection conditions' generically
